message:
✨ Add Playwright testing requirement for Netlify previews

Copilot must now use Playwright to test all Netlify preview deployments:
- Actually interact with the UI, not just take screenshots
- Verify changes work end-to-end
- Test all affected user interactions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -147,6 +147,13 @@ jobs:
           - Keep changes focused on the issue scope
           - Use TypeScript for frontend code
           - Use Go for backend code
+
+          ### Testing Requirements:
+          - **You MUST use Playwright to test the Netlify preview deployment**
+          - Do not just take screenshots - actually interact with the UI
+          - Navigate to the Netlify preview URL and verify your changes work end-to-end
+          - Test all user interactions (clicks, inputs, etc.) that your changes affect
+          - Verify the expected behavior occurs after each interaction
           EOF
           )" || true
           else
@@ -172,6 +179,13 @@ jobs:
           - Keep changes focused on the issue scope
           - Use TypeScript for frontend code
           - Use Go for backend code
+
+          ### Testing Requirements:
+          - **You MUST use Playwright to test the Netlify preview deployment**
+          - Do not just take screenshots - actually interact with the UI
+          - Navigate to the Netlify preview URL and verify your changes work end-to-end
+          - Test all user interactions (clicks, inputs, etc.) that your changes affect
+          - Verify the expected behavior occurs after each interaction
           EOF
           )" 2>&1) && COMMENT_SUCCESS=true || COMMENT_SUCCESS=false
